positive: Minimalist vector illustration design of a cosmic forest. Central composition featuring stylized, bioluminescent trees with delicate, curved silhouettes. The forest floor is paved with interlocking geometric celestial bodies (crescents, stars, planets) forming a symmetrical pattern. Above, a nebula-filled sky uses deep indigo and sapphire blue gradients, contrasted by vibrant pops of emerald green and cosmic magenta light emanating from the foliage. The style is clean, high-contrast linework with subtle gradients, evoking modern nature meets space. Perfect for screen printing on apparel. Flat graphic design, clean edges, intricate details, symmetrical composition.
negative: photorealistic, blurry, low quality, bad anatomy, text, watermark, logo, signature, noise, artifact, disfigured, extra limbs, ugly, poorly drawn, messy lines
